message:
fix(git): remove duplicate ls-remote call in BranchPushedToRemote

BranchPushedToRemote called RemoteBranchExists (which does ls-remote and
discards the SHA), then in its fallback path did a second ls-remote to
retrieve the same SHA. Save the ls-remote output from the first call and
reuse it in the fallback, eliminating a redundant network round-trip.

Closes: gt-p3yxa
